content: Clerk iOS SDK v1.2.0 (SPM: https://github.com/clerk/clerk-ios). Add ClerkKit + ClerkKitUI targets. iOS 17+. Clerk.configure(publishableKey). Sign-in: try await clerk.auth.signInWithPassword(identifier:, password:). Sign-up: try await clerk.auth.signUp(...). getToken: try await clerk.auth.getToken(). setActive: try await clerk.auth.setActive(sessionId:, organizationId:). Organization creation: Clerk.shared.organizations.create(name:). Invitations: organization.inviteMember(emailAddress:, role:). Org listing: Clerk.user?.getOrganizationMemberships. Active org: clerk.organization.
